notes.connections:
Keithley 0  (Power Supply)
    CH1 "3.3V" → 3.3 V, 1.5 A limit
    CH2 "Negative 2.5V" → 2.5 V, 1.5 A limit
    CH3 "CH3" → 0.0 V, 0.0 A limit
Hittite 0 RF1  (Signal Generator) → RF1
FieldFox 0 RF2  (Spectrum Analyzer) ← RF2
Keithley 1  (Power Supply)
    CH1 "Beam" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH2 "CH2" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH3 "CH3" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
Keysight EL 0  (Electronic Load)
    CH1 – CC mode, 0.1, input OFF
    CH2 – CR mode, 10000, input ON
notes.sources:
Keithley 0 – DUT power: 3.3V @ 3.3 V, Negative 2.5V @ 2.5 V
Hittite 0 RF1 – 2.4 GHz, -5 dBm
FieldFox 0 RF2 – Spectrum analyzer, center 2.5 GHz, span 5 GHz
Keithley 1 – DUT power supply (channels unused or 0 V)
Keysight EL 0 – Electronic load
notes.monitoring:
Keithley 0 – Monitor supply currents on all active channels
FieldFox 0 RF2 – Record output spectrum
Keithley 1 – Monitor supply currents on all active channels
Keysight EL 0 – Monitor load currents / voltages
Register reads: 0x0, 0x1, 0x3, 0x4, 0x5, 0xa, 0x10, 0x11, 0x12, 0x13, 0x14, 0x15, 0x16, 0x17, 0x18, 0x19, 0x26, 0x27
notes.general:
Config: ADMV8809
Programming logic: ADMV8809.py
Reg Programming:
	WR_SW: 0x03
	WR_Filter:0x78
	Scratch_Pad: 0xFE
HT1:
	5GHz, 0dBm
FF0:
	Reads 5GHz@-10dBm
